candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% across ALL pairs, the live signal has no historical analog — freeze new entries regardless of conviction, because directional conviction without a matched historical regime is untested pattern-fitting.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times the current indicator configuration has appeared in the historical library with a positive forward outcome. When it is 0 on every pair, the system is in a configuration it has literally never profited from — institutional flow is in a regime the strategy's memory does not cover. Acting on conv=50% (AUDNZD LONG) here is trading the narrative (BREADTH melt-up) not the verified edge, which Tenet 1 explicitly forbids.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr == 0.0: return RegimeFreeze(pair)  # even if conv >= 0.50
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe protection: avoids untested-regime entries that add variance without expected edge; estimated +0.02-0.04 Sharpe by cutting zero-expectancy trades from the sample.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: All 5 pairs report green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% as of 2026-06-16T03:14, including AUDNZD which shows dir=LONG conv=50% — the highest conviction signal is simultaneously the one with zero historical confirmation. Zero trades in last 7 days means the system is already cautious; this codifies the gate.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 on a bull-market assumption; current regime is UNKNOWN with TradingView reporting 0 signals and internal MOMENTUM at only 65% confidence — the bull-market premise underlying L8 is unverified in this regime, so its gate may be mis-calibrated until regime confirms.

reflection.system_health_note: System is correctly idle (0 trades/7d) under UNKNOWN regime with zero historical green_matches and external regime unconfirmed — verified=False on the BREADTH briefing means narrative context must not override the frozen-edge state.
